derived_metrics.name: Transcript:protein amplitude ratio
derived_metrics.field_description: Ratio of transcript log2-amplitude to protein log2-amplitude. Higher = stronger damping of transcript oscillations at the protein level (post-transcriptional buffering).

derived_metrics.name: Protein amplitude (log2)
derived_metrics.field_description: log2 peak-to-trough amplitude of protein abundance across the diel cycle. Higher = stronger protein oscillation.

derived_metrics.name: Transcript amplitude (log2)
derived_metrics.field_description: log2 peak-to-trough amplitude of transcript abundance across the diel cycle. Higher = stronger mRNA oscillation.

derived_metrics.name: Time of peak protein abundance (h)
derived_metrics.field_description: Clock-hour at which protein abundance peaks across the 14:10 diel cycle (0-24h). Phase metric (circular), not a magnitude — not rankable.

derived_metrics.name: Time of peak transcript abundance (h)
derived_metrics.field_description: Clock-hour at which mRNA abundance peaks across the 14:10 diel cycle (0-24h). Phase metric (circular), not a magnitude — not rankable.

derived_metrics.name: Protein-transcript lag (h)
derived_metrics.field_description: Lag between transcript peak and protein peak (protein_peak - transcript_peak, mod 24h). Higher = greater post-transcriptional / translational delay.

derived_metrics.name: Transcript:protein amplitude ratio
derived_metrics.field_description: Ratio of transcript log2-amplitude to protein log2-amplitude. Higher = stronger damping of transcript oscillations at the protein level (post-transcriptional buffering).

derived_metrics.name: Protein amplitude (log2)
derived_metrics.field_description: log2 peak-to-trough amplitude of protein abundance across the diel cycle. Higher = stronger protein oscillation.

derived_metrics.name: Transcript amplitude (log2)
derived_metrics.field_description: log2 peak-to-trough amplitude of transcript abundance across the diel cycle. Higher = stronger mRNA oscillation.

derived_metrics.name: Time of peak protein abundance (h)
derived_metrics.field_description: Clock-hour at which protein abundance peaks across the 14:10 diel cycle (0-24h). Phase metric (circular), not a magnitude — not rankable.

derived_metrics.name: Time of peak transcript abundance (h)
derived_metrics.field_description: Clock-hour at which mRNA abundance peaks across the 14:10 diel cycle (0-24h). Phase metric (circular), not a magnitude — not rankable.

derived_metrics.name: Protein-transcript lag (h)
derived_metrics.field_description: Lag between transcript peak and protein peak (protein_peak - transcript_peak, mod 24h). Higher = greater post-transcriptional / translational delay.
